title: Continuous vs. differentiable: a hypothesis tour
hint: pick a candidate · check which hypotheses survive

cases.name: f(x) = x
cases.svgInner: <line x1='40' y1='140' x2='280' y2='20' stroke='var(--blue)' stroke-width='2'/><line x1='40' y1='80' x2='280' y2='80' stroke='var(--mute)' stroke-dasharray='3 3' stroke-width='0.6'/><line x1='160' y1='20' x2='160' y2='140' stroke='var(--mute)' stroke-dasharray='3 3' stroke-width='0.6'/>

cases.name: f(x) = |x|
cases.svgInner: <polyline points='40,20 160,140 280,20' fill='none' stroke='var(--blue)' stroke-width='2'/><line x1='40' y1='80' x2='280' y2='80' stroke='var(--mute)' stroke-dasharray='3 3' stroke-width='0.6'/><line x1='160' y1='20' x2='160' y2='140' stroke='var(--mute)' stroke-dasharray='3 3' stroke-width='0.6'/><circle cx='160' cy='140' r='3' fill='var(--pink)'/>

continuous.note: the corner is continuous, just not smooth

differentiable.note: left and right derivatives disagree at $x = 0$

cases.name: f(x) = sin(1/x), f(0) = 0
cases.svgInner: <path d='M 40 80 Q 60 30 70 80 T 90 80 T 105 80 T 118 80 T 130 80 T 140 80 T 148 80 T 154 80 T 158 80' fill='none' stroke='var(--blue)' stroke-width='1.4' opacity='0.5'/><path d='M 162 80 T 170 80 T 182 80 T 195 80 T 210 80 T 230 80 T 260 30 T 280 80' fill='none' stroke='var(--blue)' stroke-width='1.4' opacity='0.5'/><line x1='40' y1='80' x2='280' y2='80' stroke='var(--mute)' stroke-dasharray='3 3' stroke-width='0.6'/><line x1='160' y1='20' x2='160' y2='140' stroke='var(--mute)' stroke-dasharray='3 3' stroke-width='0.6'/><circle cx='160' cy='80' r='3' fill='var(--pink)'/>

differentiable.note: discontinuous at $0$, so not differentiable there

continuous.note: uniformly convergent series of continuous functions
